data.title: STRIDE Ventures Selects Eight Teams to Transform Domestic Precious Metal Recovery
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in New York City, STRIDE Ventures, under Start2 Group, revealed the names of eight teams moving forward to Stage 1 of the Tech Metal Transformation Challenge. This initiative is backed by the U.S. National Science Foundation Directorate for Technology.

data.title: PROCURE PROTON THERAPY CENTER ENCOURAGES MEN TO PUT PROSTATE HEALTH IN THE STARTING LINEUP THIS MARCH
data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey, on March 24, 2026, ProCure Proton Therapy Center is urging millions of men preparing for college basketball's prominent month to include a PSA screening appointment on their calendars. The center, situated in Somerset, aims to raise awareness about the importance of this screening amidst the excitement of the basketball season. By scheduling this essential screening, men can prioritize their health alongside enjoying the popular sports event.

data.title: Investors face restrictions as debt rating slips - adding to woes in private credit sector.
data.description: In the recent report, it was mentioned that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached 150,000, with 10,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The death toll has also risen to 5,000, with 500 new deaths recorded yesterday. Hospitals are currently overwhelmed, with 80% of ICU beds occupied. The government is urging citizens to follow safety protocols, including wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to curb the spread of the virus. Vaccination efforts are ongoing, with 30% of the population already vaccinated. Stay updated for more information on the situation.

data.title: ALL PRO DAD EXPANDS NATIONAL FATHERHOOD MOVEMENT AS STATES RESPOND TO FAMILY CHALLENGES
data.description: Ohio has recently joined a multi-state initiative aimed at enhancing family support and advancing child welfare. This effort encompasses policymakers from various states in the United States who are committed to improving the well-being of children and families. The decision by Ohio to participate in this collaboration, announced on March 24, 2026, in Tampa, Florida, reflects the increasing momentum behind this initiative. With several states already on board, this collective effort is gaining traction in its mission to enhance outcomes for children and strengthen family units nationwide.

data.title: AES Posts New Fixed Income Investor Materials
data.description: Today, in Arlington, Virginia, The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) released updated fixed income investor resources titled "Parent Liquidity Schedules" on their website. To access the document, visit www.aes.com, navigate to the Investors section, and select Fixed Income. This update provides crucial financial information for investors interested in AES, a leading corporation in the industry.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. Announces Year-End Results of Operations
data.description: In Warrenville, Illinois, on March 24, 2026, Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. disclosed their audited financial outcomes for 2025. The company (NYSE American: CVR) reported significant changes from the prior year. In 2025, their consolidated results showcased a notable increase in net profits compared to the figures in 2024. The detailed summary of the company's financial performance for the years ended December 31 in both 2025 and 2024 was publicized. These results demonstrate a positive trend for Chicago Rivet & Machine Co., indicating growth and successful operations in the specified period.

data.title: Cadiz Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend for Q1 2026 on Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
data.description: On March 24, 2026, in Los Angeles, Cadiz, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDZI / CDZIP), a California-based water solutions firm, disclosed a cash dividend declared by its Board of Directors. The dividend pertains to the Company's 8.875% Series A Cumulative Perpetual, indicating a significant financial decision aimed at providing returns to its investors. With this move, Cadiz aims to enhance investor trust and showcase its commitment to generating value through dividends.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. Announces Year-End Results of Operations
data.description: Warrenville, Illinois - Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE: CVR) has disclosed audited financial results for the fiscal year 2025. Key details include the company's annual performance for the year ending on December 31. Comprehensive information is accessible through Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rio Tinto, Queensland and Commonwealth secure long-term future for Boyne aluminium smelter at Gladstone
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, a significant partnership has been established between Rio Tinto, the Queensland Government, and the Commonwealth Government. The goal of this agreement is to sustain the Boyne aluminium smelter at Gladstone for the long term and uphold its international competitiveness post the current power contract. This collaboration is crucial for securing the future of aluminium smelting in Queensland, supplementing prior power purchase agreements (PPAs) made by Rio Tinto that have backed A$7.5 billion in investments.

data.title: PrideStaff Named to ClearlyRated's Best Staffing Firms for Women List for Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: In Fresno, California, on March 24, 2026, PrideStaff, a franchised staffing organization, has once again been honored by ClearlyRated's® Best Staffing Firms for Women list. This marks the fourth consecutive year that PrideStaff has achieved this recognition, showcasing their ongoing dedication to supporting women in the workforce. The award recognizes staffing firms that exhibit outstanding dedication to providing opportunities for women in the industry.

data.title: M-tron Industries, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2025 Results
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, revenues totaled $14.2 million, marking an increase from the $12.8 million reported in the same period in 2024. The gross margin for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, stood at 46.9%, slightly lower than the 47.2% recorded during the same period the previous year.

data.title: Braze Stock Shoots Higher After Q4 Revenue Surprises To Upside
data.description: Braze, Inc. (NASDAQ: BRZE) witnessed a surge in its stock during after-hours trading following the release of its Q4 earnings report. The company surpassed revenue expectations with $205.17 million in revenue, exceeding the Street's forecast of $198.21 million. Although the quarterly adjusted earnings of ten cents per share fell short of the estimated 14 cents, Braze announced a $100 million share buyback program. Notable highlights include a 28% revenue growth in Q4 and 24% for the fiscal year. Stay updated on BRZE stock movements. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PrideStaff Financial Named to ClearlyRated's Best Staffing Firms for Women List for Fourth Consecutive Year
data.description: In Fresno, California, on March 24, 2026, PrideStaff Financial, a division of PrideStaff that focuses on accounting and finance staffing, was recognized in ClearlyRated's® 2026 Best Staffing Firms for Women list. This marks the fourth year in a row that PrideStaff Financial has received this distinction.

data.title: Home Safety Expert Scott Jay of Springfield, Missouri Explains Dryer Fire Prevention in Multi-Unit Properties for HelloNation
data.description: Springfield, Mo., 24th March 2026 - To mitigate the risk of dryer fires in apartment buildings and vacation rentals in Springfield, Ozark, and Nixa, property managers are advised to focus on regular dryer vent cleaning. An article by HelloNation highlights the importance of this practice in preventing potential disasters. Taking proactive measures such as cleaning vents regularly can significantly reduce the likelihood of dryer fires. It is crucial for property managers to prioritize safety by ensuring that maintenance routines include this essential task.

data.title: Carrot Launches AI-Powered Global Price Monitoring System to Detect Fraud in Fertility Care Worldwide
data.description: Based on extensive data from the largest fertility pricing database globally, a new system has been introduced to identify billing misuse that conventional systems overlook. In Des Moines on March 24, 2026, it was reported that billions of dollars from employers are being directed towards fertility and family-building services. The majority of cases involve undetected billing issues, raising concerns about financial transparency in this sector.
